subcodes.title: Du’a’-i-Salavat-i-Kazim
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Verily, Thou art the One Who illumineth all things by Thy light and draweth all things nigh through the glances of Thy nearness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم انک انت مجلی کل شیء بنورک و مجذب کل شیء بلحظات قربک لاسئلنک من ظهورات
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
